We are definitely impressed by your academic records and have shortlisted your file for further evaluation. Our Admissions Tutors are going through the information you have provided in greater detail right now.



Meanwhile, here are a few FAQs you may find useful:



Q: I have been shortlisted but have not received an offer by now, what does that mean?

A: It means that we are hoping and working really hard to give you a decision soon. An initial review has been done on your application and we are now taking a closer look at the other qualities and achievements you have presented in your file.
